evals.prompt: I need to add guided tours to our React dashboard so new users know what each page does. Can you help set that up?
expectations: Should recommend installing driver.js
Should create a tour registry with localStorage-based state management
Should create a usePageTour hook with anchor polling guardrail
Should mention 3-5 step limit per tour with research backing
Should include safe localStorage wrappers for iOS private browsing
Should create step files with data-tour attribute targeting pattern

evals.prompt: Add a walkthrough for the Settings page that highlights the profile section, notification preferences, and theme toggle
expectations: Should create a step file with 3-4 steps targeting data-tour attributes
Should register the tour in tourRegistry.ts
Should add usePageTour hook call in the Settings page component
Should follow copy rules: max 2 sentences, no jargon, value-first
Step copy should use boss framing (Your settings, Your preferences)

evals.prompt: Build an interactive demo tour for our analytics dashboard that zooms into charts and toggles data layers
expectations: Should use useDemoTour hook (not usePageTour)
Should create DemoStep interfaces with action callbacks
Should create project-specific demo helpers (navigateTo, toggleFeature, etc.)
Should implement double-tap guard for async actions
Should include per-step overlayOpacity (0 for actions, 0.15 for narration)
Should set overlay opacity directly on SVG path, NOT via setConfig()

evals.prompt: We need contextual help tooltips on all the KPI cards in our dashboard
expectations: Should create centralized tooltip-content.ts file
Should create InfoTooltip component wrapping Radix UI Tooltip
Should write tooltip copy in plain English, no jargon
Tooltip content should be 1 sentence per field

evals.prompt: Can you add a page guide / SOP section to our Reports page that explains what each report type does?
expectations: Should create SOP types (SopContent, SopFeature, SopStep, SopQuestion)
Should add content entry in sopContent.ts
Should render via PageGuide component (collapsible, default collapsed)
Content should include: pageDescription, features, howToUse, commonQuestions

evals.prompt: Fix the bug where our API endpoint returns 500 for large payloads
Set up authentication with OAuth2 and refresh tokens
Our tour has 12 steps and nobody finishes it. How do we fix completion rates?
expectations: Should cite Chameleon research: 4-step tours = 74% completion, 7+ = 16%
Should recommend splitting into 3-5 step micro-tours
Should suggest contextual triggers (page visit, drawer open, tab switch)
Should recommend removing gamification if present
Should recommend value-first copy (first step shows result, not explanation)
